summary: Joe Reis is seeking help connecting with Ralph Kimball to arrange a historic podcast discussion between Kimball and Bill Inmon, the two foundational figures in data warehousing. Bill Inmon has already agreed to participate, but Reis needs assistance locating Kimball.
key_points: Bill Inmon's recent post about Kimball vs Inmon architectures sparked interest in a joint discussion
Bill Inmon has agreed to participate in a podcast interview
Ralph Kimball has been difficult to reach directly
This would unite two legendary figures in data warehousing history
money_quotes: This would be a very unique opportunity to bring together two all time titans of the data world for an amazing and down-to-earth discussion on my podcast.
key_insight: A conversation between Kimball and Inmon—the two architects whose competing methodologies have shaped decades of data warehousing practice—would be a landmark event for the data community.
